---
title: "optimization_v2"
author: "Celeste x chat"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

This version incorporates Rebecca's concern (that the values are per lb and not adjusted for the actual weights expected based on the type of meat)

## Part 0: Load data

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(lpSolve)

optimization <- read.csv("optimization_data.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

```

## Scenario 1v2

```{r}
# Setup
# ----------------------------
x0 <- optimization$Menu_freq_f25
n  <- nrow(optimization)

meals_served <- sum(x0)

# Lower bound (e.g., max 50% reduction)
reduction <- 0.5
lower <- ceiling(x0 * reduction)

# Upper bound (e.g., max 50% increase)
max_multiplier <- 1.5
upper <- floor(x0 * max_multiplier)

# ----------------------------
# NEW: portion-adjusted price per "menu appearance"
# ----------------------------
# Clean/validate portion weights
if (!("Expected_lb_meat_portion" %in% names(optimization))) {
  stop("Column Expected_lb_meat_portion not found in optimization_data.csv")
}

portion_lb <- optimization$Expected_lb_meat_portion
if (any(is.na(portion_lb))) {
  stop("Expected_lb_meat_portion has NA values. Please fill them before optimizing.")
}
if (any(portion_lb < 0)) {
  stop("Expected_lb_meat_portion has negative values. Please correct them.")
}

# Sustainable flag from Default_sus
sus_flag <- ifelse(tolower(optimization$Default_sus) %in% c("yes","y","true","1"), 1, 0)

# Effective price per lb used for costing:
# if Default_sus == yes -> Sustainable_price_lb else Conventional_price_lb
price_lb <- ifelse(sus_flag == 1,
                   optimization$Sustainable_price_lb,
                   optimization$Conventional_price_lb)

# Portion-adjusted "cost per appearance" (THIS is what we minimize / constrain on)
cost_per_appearance <- price_lb * portion_lb

# "Sustainable spend per appearance" (only counts when Default_sus == yes)
sus_cost_per_appearance <- optimization$Sustainable_price_lb * portion_lb * sus_flag

# GHG per appearance (uses your existing conventional GHG per lb * portion lbs)
ghg_per_appearance <- optimization$Conventional_GHG_per_lb * portion_lb

# ----------------------------
# Constraint matrix
# ----------------------------
# 1) Maintain total meals: sum(x) = meals_served
A <- matrix(1, nrow = 1, ncol = n)
dir <- "="
rhs <- meals_served

# 2) Lower bounds: x_i >= lower_i
A <- rbind(A, diag(n))
dir <- c(dir, rep(">=", n))
rhs <- c(rhs, lower)

# 3) Upper bounds: x_i <= upper_i (for non-NA uppers)
if (any(!is.na(upper))) {
  idx <- which(!is.na(upper))
  A <- rbind(A, diag(n)[idx, , drop = FALSE])
  dir <- c(dir, rep("<=", length(idx)))
  rhs <- c(rhs, upper[idx])
}

# ----------------------------
# Stage 1: minimize portion-adjusted total cost
# ----------------------------
sol1 <- lp(
  direction = "min",
  objective.in = cost_per_appearance,
  const.mat = A,
  const.dir = dir,
  const.rhs = rhs,
  all.int = TRUE
)

sol1$status  # 0 means success
x1 <- sol1$solution

opt_cost <- sum(cost_per_appearance * x1)

# ----------------------------
# Stage 2: maximize sustainable spend given (near-)optimal cost
# ----------------------------
cost_slack <- 0.001  # 0.1%

A2   <- rbind(A, cost_per_appearance)
dir2 <- c(dir, "<=")
rhs2 <- c(rhs, opt_cost * (1 + cost_slack))

sol2 <- lp(
  direction = "max",
  objective.in = sus_cost_per_appearance,
  const.mat = A2,
  const.dir = dir2,
  const.rhs = rhs2,
  all.int = TRUE
)

sol2$status
x2 <- sol2$solution

opt_sus <- sum(sus_cost_per_appearance * x2)

# ----------------------------
# Stage 3: minimize GHG given cost cap + sustainable spend floor
# ----------------------------
sus_slack <- 0.0  # require best sustainable spend found in stage 2

A3   <- rbind(A2, sus_cost_per_appearance)
dir3 <- c(dir2, ">=")
rhs3 <- c(rhs2, opt_sus * (1 - sus_slack))

sol3 <- lp(
  direction = "min",
  objective.in = ghg_per_appearance,
  const.mat = A3,
  const.dir = dir3,
  const.rhs = rhs3,
  all.int = TRUE
)

sol3$status
x3 <- sol3$solution

# ----------------------------
# Summary helper
# ----------------------------
summ <- function(x) {
  total_cost <- sum(cost_per_appearance * x)
  sus_spend  <- sum(sus_cost_per_appearance * x)
  sus_pct    <- if (total_cost > 0) sus_spend / total_cost else NA_real_
  total_ghg  <- sum(ghg_per_appearance * x)

  c(
    meals = sum(x),
    total_cost = total_cost,
    sus_spend = sus_spend,
    sus_pct = sus_pct,
    total_ghg = total_ghg
  )
}

rbind(
  baseline = summ(x0),
  stage1_min_cost = summ(x1),
  stage2_max_sus_given_cost = summ(x2),
  stage3_min_ghg_given_cost_sus = summ(x3)
)
```
```{r}
# -----------------------------------------
# Add optimized frequencies to dataframe
# -----------------------------------------

optimization <- optimization %>%
  mutate(
    freq_baseline = Menu_freq_f25,
    freq_opt_s3 = x3,
    delta_s3 = freq_opt_s3 - freq_baseline
  )


# -----------------------------------------
# Category totals
# -----------------------------------------

category_totals_s3 <- optimization %>%
  group_by(Category) %>%
  summarise(
    baseline_meals = sum(freq_baseline, na.rm = TRUE),
    opt_meals_s3   = sum(freq_opt_s3, na.rm = TRUE),
    delta_meals_s3 = sum(delta_s3, na.rm = TRUE),

    baseline_share = baseline_meals / sum(freq_baseline, na.rm = TRUE),
    opt_share_s3   = opt_meals_s3 / sum(freq_opt_s3, na.rm = TRUE),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(opt_meals_s3))


# View category totals
category_totals_s3


# -----------------------------------------
# Save updated optimization table
# -----------------------------------------

write.csv(
  optimization,
  file = "optimization_including_scenario3_results.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

```
